posts.text:
God blessed us with the opportunity to take part in this rescue mission in the Middle East.

Video

🚨 School Schedule Changes in the Lowcountry 🚨

Ahead of expected severe weather tomorrow, some Lowcountry schools have announced schedule changes, including cancellations and e-learning days.

Be sure to stay up to date with your district and local weather information.

South Carolina STRONG.

Let us put this in perspective.

Roughly 800 American missiles have been used in just three days of fighting in the Middle East. More than Ukraine has fired during their entire war.

If this doesn't show you the severity, and URGENCY of this situation, we're not sure what will.

This is not a time to play politics, point fingers or sit around scratching our heads. American citizens are still stranded. Still waiting. Still hoping their government considers their lives worth the urgency.

The peop

🚨Severe Weather Warning🚨

Tonight into tomorrow, the Lowcountry is under a severe weather watch. Strong winds, heavy thunderstorms, and a chance of tornadoes are in the forecast.

Stay aware, stay safe, and keep an eye on your local weather updates.

South Carolina STRONG.

We still need planes to get Americans out.


Rep. Nancy Mace (@RepNancyMace)

We brought the attention. Washington listened. God provided.

More planes. More evacuations. More Americans coming home from the Middle East.

Thank you to the @StateDept, El Al Airlines and every embassy working tirelessly for our people.

This is what America does. We do not abandon our own. We do not look away. We do not wait. No man, woman, or child left behind.

@greybullrescue

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/

I do not want to send South Carolina’s sons and daughters into war with Iran.
Community note: Five days ago, Rep. Mace argued for continuation of the war in Iran, where soldiers from SC children are being sent: “President Trump is doing what needs to be done. . . . This is not the time for Congress to tie the hands of our Commander-in-Chief. We must finish the job.”

x.com/repnancymace/s…

❗REMINDER❗ 

The deadline for South Carolina's 1st District high school students to submit their work for the Congressional Art Competition is Monday, March 30th.

The winner will have their art displayed in the United States Capitol and earn a chance to visit our Congressional office in Washington, D.C. 

Learn more here: mace.house.gov/2026-congress…

Goose Creek is home. And the people who keep it running deserve to be seen.

We sat down with Chuck Denson, Director of Public Works for the City of Goose Creek, to discuss water infrastructure funding and federal resources for one of the Lowcountry’s fastest-growing communities.

The Lowcountry doesn’t work without them.

South Carolina STRONG.

One terrorist regime cannot simply be replaced by another.

Cautious days ahead.

Video

When the world becomes dangerous, leadership becomes a question of character, not convenience.

We saw it firsthand in Israel. We saw it in the volunteers risking everything to evacuate strangers. We saw it in Grey Bull Rescue and we saw it in the faces of 155 Americans boarding a plane to safety.

This is what our nation is capable of when we refuse to give up on our people.

Today we pray for the 2,500 Marines sent to the Middle East, for their families, and for their safety and the success of their mission.

May God watch over every American service member standing in harm’s way and guide our nation’s leaders with courage, clarity, and a commitment to peace through strength.

God bless our troops and God bless the United States of America. 🇺🇸🙏

There are two sexes: male and female.

And yet, the federal government has been cluttering official forms and surveys with gender identity options rooted in ideology, not biology.

We introduced the Restoring Biological Truth in Government Act so every executive agency, department, military branch, and government corporation is prohibited from asking about gender identity, prohibited from offering any option other than male or female when asking about sex or gender, and required to reject any re

We work for the American people, we will stop at nothing to help the American people, whether you are in South Carolina or thousands of miles away.

Grey Bull Rescue has saved over 8,000 people, but we need funding, we need planes, and we need more leaders willing to step up to bring our people home.

Video

Our office celebrated the ribbon cutting for Mountain High Outfitters in Bluffton, their second location in South Carolina. 

Supporting local businesses in the Lowcountry is always a priority for our office. 

South Carolina STRONG.

The last thing we want is South Carolinians going over seas to the Middle East to fight in a forever war.

We are relying on our air support and the superiority of our military to do what is necessary and get out.

Video

We brought the attention. Washington listened. God provided.

More planes. More evacuations. More Americans coming home from the Middle East.

Thank you to the @StateDept, El Al Airlines and every embassy working tirelessly for our people.

This is what America does. We do not abandon our own. We do not look away. We do not wait. No man, woman, or child left behind.

@greybullrescue

Video

Help is on the way. No Americans left behind.

@greybullrescue

These are OUR people. Americans who cannot get home.

They are being turned away because there aren't enough seats on a plane and there aren't enough planes.

I will not rest until every American who wants to go home gets home.

Video
